alignments.candidate_evidence: Built and scaled global commercial operations frameworks and transformation programs at Google across multiple regions; designed processes, governance models, and escalation protocols for cross-functional alignment and risk mitigation
alignments.job_requirement: Architect, own, and continuously evolve Airwallex's global Operational Risk Framework, including standards, governance, and escalation protocols

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years leading strategy and operations with accountability for systemic risk identification, root-cause analysis of operational failures, and escalation protocols; demonstrated ability to challenge deeply and hold teams accountable
alignments.job_requirement: Serve as the senior 2LoD authority for operational risk boundary breaches, including tracking systemic exposures, driving root cause analysis, and escalating material issues

alignments.candidate_evidence: Designs and directs LLM coding agents; owns evaluation methodology and benchmarking; builds Looker dashboards and writes SQL/BigQuery queries to pull and shape data for insights; demonstrates capability in automation and analytics
alignments.job_requirement: Drive a more modern, scalable control environment by pushing the organization toward automated, data-driven controls and embedded guardrails

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight-year tenure at Google managing global stakeholders, C-level partnerships, and cross-functional transformation; strong executive presence and ability to influence at scale
alignments.job_requirement: Engage credibly with senior executives, regulators, auditors, and cross-functional stakeholders, and challenge constructively in a fast-moving environment

gaps.gap: No fintech, banking, payments, or financial-services industry experience; all background is enterprise tech (Google Devices & Services)
gaps.mitigation: Fintech-specific risk frameworks, regulatory language, customer-trust dynamics, and compliance constraints are foundational to the role. Industry transition requires 12–18 month immersion; role is embedded second line to regulators from day one.

gaps.gap: No demonstrated experience with operational risk methodologies (Basel operational risk principles, COSO, ISO standards) or regulatory risk frameworks
gaps.mitigation: These are non-negotiable for 2LoD credibility with regulators and auditors. Candidate has no evidence of CRISC, CISA, CAMS, or equivalent certifications mentioned as preferred.

gaps.gap: No direct experience in second-line governance, risk and control self-assessments, key risk indicators (KRIs), loss event management, or issue escalation frameworks specific to regulated environments
gaps.mitigation: Core technical competencies for the role. Commercial ops frameworks do not generalize to regulatory second-line discipline required in fintech.

gaps.gap: No third-party risk management, vendor due-diligence, or outsourcing governance experience in regulated or fintech contexts
gaps.mitigation: Role explicitly requires building and enforcing third-party risk governance across payment partners, cloud providers, and critical ecosystem dependencies. No comparable Airwallex or fintech work shown.

gaps.gap: No business continuity, operational resilience, recovery-and-resolution, or crisis-recovery planning experience in regulated environments
gaps.mitigation: JD explicitly requires owning second-line operational resilience framework and scenario testing. Candidate's transformation background is operational delivery, not financial-services resilience architecture.

gaps.gap: No fraud risk governance experience in digital payments (account takeover, onboarding fraud, merchant fraud, card-not-present fraud)
gaps.mitigation: Listed as preferred, not minimum. Still, fraud-specific risk governance in payments is a specialized domain requiring fintech or banking background.

hard_blockers.evidence: "You have 12 to 15+ years of experience across operational risk, enterprise risk, technology risk, operational resilience, or related control disciplines within financial services, banking, payments, or fintech." Candidate has 8 years in enterprise tech operations (Google), none in financial services, banking, payments, fintech, risk, compliance, or regulatory domains.

"You have built and scaled end-to-end operational risk frameworks, including risk and control self-assessments, key risk indicators, loss event management, issue management, and escalation governance." Candidate's frameworks are commercial operations (pricing, territory management, global alignment); no operational risk, KRI, loss event, or regulatory escalation experience.

"You have direct experience with third-party risk management, including risk tiering, due diligence, ongoing oversight, and governance of critical outsourcing or vendor relationships." Candidate has no third-party risk, vendor due diligence, or outsourcing governance experience in fintech or regulated contexts.

output.level_rationale: Senior Director title with 12–15+ years required experience, 5+ years managing global multi-regional 2LoD teams, and credible engagement with C-suite and regulators. JD scope spans end-to-end framework ownership, controls architecture, and executive governance—characteristic of L6 senior IC or manager-of-managers in risk leadership.
output.summary: Global Risk leadership role building operational risk frameworks and 2LoD governance at a $8B fintech. Requires 12–15+ years fintech/banking risk experience, 5+ years senior team leadership, and deep operational risk / regulatory frameworks expertise. Candidate brings 8 years Google strategy/ops and commercial transformation with no fintech, regulatory, risk, or compliance background. Strong execution and AI tooling capability do not translate to specialized risk frameworks, Basel/COSO methodologies, third-party risk governance, or regulatory credibility required for senior 2LoD leadership in regulated fintech.
